content: KSA facility has $2.375B total limit across 5 tranches (Goldman, Citi, Atlas/Apollo, Morgan Stanley). Largest BNPL securitization in MENA region.
Default rate (+120 DPD) ranges 2-8% across vintages. Recent vintages (2024 H2) trending higher at 5-8% vs early 2024 at 2-4%. Seasonal pattern suspected (Ramadan spending).
BNPL+ product (SAR 5K-20K, Murabaha) shows higher default rates than standard BNPL (up to SAR 5K). Longer tenor (4-24 months) increases credit risk window.
All performance triggers currently compliant. Key metrics: cumulative default rate, delinquency rate, dilution rate. 3-level trigger system (L1 stop funding, L2 cash sweep, L3 EoD).
UAE facility is $131M (Goldman, 2 tranches) — significantly smaller than KSA ($2.375B). UAE is a newer market for Tamara with less historical data.
UAE has fewer tabs (10 vs 14 for KSA) — no demographics, financial performance, business plan, or BNPL+ deep dive. Reflects less available data for the newer market.
